<!-- title: Section (TeaScript) -->
<!-- pageid: 1278 -->
<!-- revid: 9856 -->
<!-- timestamp: 2024-12-14T22:38:08Z -->
<!-- source: https://wohlsoft.ru/pgewiki/Section_(TeaScript) -->

Section is a class in TeaScript.vbs that allows you to read/write values of level sections.

=Using the Section Class=
To read the value of <code>Section</code> use:
<syntaxhighlight lang="vb">
 Section(index).name
</syntaxhighlight>


To change the value of <code>Section</code> use:
<syntaxhighlight lang="vb">
 Section(index).name = value
</syntaxhighlight>

Where index is the section ID as shown in the editor.


=Section Properties=

=====Physical Properties=====
{{Tea_table|1=  
  {{Tea_row|double|x|-|The top left x position of the section in scene coordinates.}}
  {{Tea_row|double|y|-|The top left y position of the section in scene coordinates.}}
  {{Tea_row|double|width|-|The current width}}
  {{Tea_row|double|height|-|The current height}}
}}
=====Unknown=====
{{Tea_table|1=  
  {{Tea_row|double|forcewidth|-|Returns the forced width size of the given section}}
  {{Tea_row|double|forceheight|-|Returns the forced height size of the given section}}
  {{Tea_row|double|forced|-|Returns 1 if the section's boundary has been edited via events}}
  {{Tea_row|double|forcexsp|-
|Returns the auto-scrolling X-speed}}
  {{Tea_row|double|forceysp|-
|Returns the auto-scrolling Y speed}}
  {{Tea_row|double|forcex|-
|The X coordinates of the beginning of the section}}
  {{Tea_row|double|forcey|-
|The Y coordinates of the beginning of the section}}
}}

=Oddities and Quirks=
Below is a list of certain quirks sections have that does not conform to standard behavior or simply other miscellaneous behavior.

[[Category:TeaScript.vbs]]
